marketing.pages.home.metadata.title: ATLVS — Production Management Software for Live Experiences
marketing.pages.home.metadata.descriptio: ATLVS Technologies — production management, crew operations, and ticketing software built for live events. Three apps, one schema: ATLVS for producers, COMPVSS for crew, GVTEWAY for guests. Pitch through wrap on a single platform.
marketing.pages.home.hero.subtitleGvtewa: runs the portal. Pitch through wrap on a single connected platform for live experiential production.
marketing.pages.home.hero.disclaimer: Free forever for small teams · No credit card required · Per-org pricing
marketing.pages.home.trustBar.label: Trusted by production teams behind
marketing.pages.home.threeApps.title: Three apps, one schema.
marketing.pages.home.threeApps.body: ATLVS Technologies ships three connected products on a shared Postgres database. Adopt one or run the full platform — every record flows across producer console, field PWA, and stakeholder portal.
marketing.pages.home.products.atlvs.body: Projects, RFIs, submittals, daily logs, advancing, finance, procurement, AI assistant. The producer's console — pitch through wrap.
marketing.pages.home.products.compvss.bo: Scheduling, certifications, gate scan, shift clock-in, incidents, medical. Offline-first PWA. Sub-100ms scans on one-bar LTE.
marketing.pages.home.products.gvteway.bo: Ticketing, proposals, twelve personas. Artists, vendors, clients, sponsors, guests — each their lane.
marketing.pages.home.industries.title: Production teams running real work.
marketing.pages.home.industries.body: The schema is generic. The vernacular is specific. Pick the kind of production you ship and the platform speaks your language out of the box.
marketing.pages.home.industries.footnote: Hospitality, corporate, and private events too —
marketing.pages.home.industries.items.fe: Multi-stage infrastructure, headliner advance, and gate operations at scale.
marketing.pages.home.industries.items.co: Show production, multi-city routing, advancing, and settlement for live music.
marketing.pages.home.industries.items.br: Experiential marketing, pop-ups, and environments that convert.
marketing.pages.home.industries.items.im: Narrative installations and worlds audiences step inside — ticketed, timed, tracked.
marketing.pages.home.industries.items.sp: Stadium activations, fan experiences, and game-day production operations.
marketing.pages.home.industries.items.tv: Live broadcast, content capture, crew compliance, and on-air activations.
marketing.pages.home.industries.items.co: Summits, annual meetings, internal kickoffs, premium hospitality.
marketing.pages.home.industries.items.th: Productions, residencies, repertory seasons, touring theatre.
marketing.pages.home.lifecycle.title: Discovery to Strike on one timeline.
marketing.pages.home.lifecycle.body: Every production runs through the same eight phases. The schema follows the phases, the audit log follows the schema, and every approval gate blocks the next phase until the previous one closes.
marketing.pages.home.difference.title: Not a CRM stitched to a PM tool.
marketing.pages.home.difference.body: Most production-operations stacks bolt together a CRM, a project tool, a doc tool, and a ticketing integration. ATLVS Technologies owns the entire stack — every app built in-house, every record connected.
marketing.pages.home.difference.edges.en: Pitch through wrap, all eight phases, in one workspace. No integration tax, no schema reconciliation.
marketing.pages.home.difference.edges.pr: ATLVS, COMPVSS, and GVTEWAY share a single Postgres schema. No vendor lock-in dressed up as integrations.
marketing.pages.home.difference.edges.pe: The whole production team, every freelancer, every vendor. Pricing scales with you, not your headcount.
marketing.pages.home.adopt.title: Start where you are.
marketing.pages.home.adopt.body: Run the whole platform end to end, take a single app, or pick exactly the modules your scope needs. Same database in every case.
marketing.pages.home.adopt.tiers.fullPla: Every phase of the production lifecycle, pitch to wrap — one workspace, one schema, total accountability.
marketing.pages.home.adopt.tiers.singleA: Start with ATLVS, COMPVSS, or GVTEWAY individually. Same database, expand when ready.
marketing.pages.home.adopt.tiers.modules: RFIs, advancing, inspections, gate scan. Buy exactly the modules your scope demands.
marketing.pages.home.projects.title: Shipped on ATLVS.
marketing.pages.home.projects.body: A selection of productions our customers have shipped using ATLVS Technologies — across festivals, brand activations, and broadcast.

Concert Experience · Miami Music Week · Club Space
marketing.pages.home.projects.items.rrr0: Motorsports · F1 Las Vegas Grand Prix
marketing.pages.home.faq.title: Frequently Asked.
marketing.pages.home.faq.items.whatIsAtl: ATLVS Technologies is the platform behind live experiential production. Three connected apps on one database: ATLVS for producers (projects, RFIs, advancing, finance, procurement, AI), COMPVSS for crew (scheduling, certifications, gate scan, incidents), and GVTEWAY for guests and stakeholders (ticketing, proposals, twelve personas). Same record across all three, pitch through wrap.
marketing.pages.home.faq.items.whoIsItFo: Who is the ATLVS platform for?

Production teams running real live work. Festivals, residencies, touring, fabrication shops, brand activations, broadcast compounds, private events. The schema is generic; the vernacular is specific. If your org has a load-in, a manifest, vendors, and a wrap — it fits.
marketing.pages.home.faq.items.pricing.a: Per organization, not per seat. Free forever for solo operators and small teams. Crew opens up the team. Production unlocks every module plus multi-project. Festival is multi-org with SSO, custom DPA, and a 99.9% SLA. Full grid at /pricing.
marketing.pages.home.faq.items.vendorPay: Stripe Connect. Vendors onboard a payout account through their portal. You approve the PO. Payouts route directly. Money never crosses our books. ACH, card, international wire. Signed webhooks for every event.
marketing.pages.home.faq.items.compvssOf: Yes. COMPVSS is an offline-first PWA. Gate scan, shift clock-in, daily log, incident, medic intake — all queue locally and sync on signal return. Sub-100ms scan even on one-bar LTE. Tested at 15,000-guest gates.
marketing.pages.home.faq.items.whoBuilds: ATLVS Technologies is a GHXSTSHIP Industries company — the technology arm of an experiential production house headquartered in Miami with offices in New York, Chicago, and Los Angeles. ATLVS, COMPVSS, and GVTEWAY are built in-house by people who have shipped real shows.
marketing.pages.home.faq.items.dataSecur: Row-level security at the database — your tenant is walled off in Postgres, not in the app layer. Every change writes to an immutable audit log (actor, IP, user agent, before/after). Signed webhooks (HMAC-SHA256). File shares self-expire. SOC-2 attestation plus custom DPA on Festival tier.
marketing.pages.home.faq.items.aiAssista: Is the AI assistant useful or marketing?

Useful. It reads your workspace data — never the public internet — and drafts riders, RFPs, call sheets, recaps, safety briefs, and incident reports. Streaming, conversation-persisted in your tenant. Anthropic Claude under the hood.
marketing.pages.home.faq.items.exportDat: Always. CSV exports on every tier from every list view. Full data export via Settings → Exports on Production and above. You own the data; we host it. Cancel and you get a 90-day read-only window to pull everything.

marketing.pages.pricing.comparison.intro: The full grid. If a module you need is gated above where you are,
marketing.pages.pricing.faqs.title: Pricing FAQ
marketing.pages.pricing.faqs.perSeat.a: Per org. Production is unlimited users for $199/month. Adding the crew never becomes a surprise line item.
marketing.pages.pricing.faqs.freeReallyF: Forever. Basic projects, guest + artist portals, three users, up to 100 portal credentials per project. No card.
Crew and Production unlock every feature in the tier for 14 days. No card up front. Don't upgrade by day 14? You drop to Free — your data stays where it is.
marketing.pages.pricing.faqs.changeTiers: Anytime. Upgrades hit instantly. Downgrades kick in at the end of the billing period. Nothing gets deleted — features above your tier go read-only until you come back.
30% off Crew and Production for registered nonprofits and community arts programs. Email hello@atlvs.pro with your 501(c)(3) or equivalent.
No. Scan all weekend. Every weekend.
marketing.pages.pricing.faqs.festivalVsP: What's in Festival that isn't in Production?
Multi-org with SSO. Custom roles + access policies. SOC-2 attestation pack. Custom DPA. Dedicated CSM. 99.9% uptime SLA. Source-available license. Custom integrations we build with you.
marketing.pages.pricing.faqs.selfHost.a: Source-available license ships with Festival. Managed infrastructure is the recommended route — handles security, storage, and uptime.
marketing.pages.pricing.faqs.dataAfterCa: What happens to my data if I cancel?
Export everything — CSV or JSON — anytime. After cancel, your data lives 90 days read-only (re-subscribe and you're back), then purges. Signed logs of the purge on request. You own the data.
marketing.pages.pricing.cta.title: ATLVS Is Open.
marketing.pages.pricing.cta.subtitle: Sign up free — 30 seconds, no card. Free is free, forever.

marketing.pages.pt-BR.metadata.descripti: A plataforma para produção ao vivo. Três apps, um schema, cada módulo — do pitch ao wrap. RLS no banco. Construído por operadores.
plataforma para produção de eventos ao vivo
marketing.pages.pt-BR.jsonLd.description: A plataforma para produção ao vivo.
marketing.pages.pt-BR.hero.subtitle: A plataforma para trabalho ao vivo. Do pitch ao wrap, em um workspace. Três apps, um schema, cada módulo — da pré-produção ao strike.
marketing.pages.pt-BR.apps.subtitle: Um banco de dados. Três superfícies otimizadas. O mesmo registro do escritório, do portal e do campo.
marketing.pages.pt-BR.apps.atlvs.body: RFIs, submittals, daily logs, punch, advancing, financeiro, procurement, IA. Uma sidebar só. Do pitch ao wrap.
marketing.pages.pt-BR.apps.gvteway.body: Doze personas. Cada uma na sua faixa. Artistas veem riders. Vendors veem POs. Clientes veem propostas.
marketing.pages.pt-BR.apps.compvss.body: Offline. Sub-100ms. Scan, ponto, incidente, médico, brief diário. Funciona com uma barra de LTE.
marketing.pages.pt-BR.faq.title: FAQ
marketing.pages.pt-BR.faq.q1.question: O que a plataforma faz?
marketing.pages.pt-BR.faq.q1.answer: Quarenta e sete módulos em três apps que compartilham um banco de dados. ATLVS é o workspace de operações — RFIs, submittals, daily logs, punch, advancing, financeiro, procurement, IA. GVTEWAY é o portal de stakeholders. COMPVSS é o PWA offline-first do campo — scan de portão, ponto eletrônico, incidentes, médico, briefing diário de segurança.
marketing.pages.pt-BR.faq.q2.question: Pra quem é?
marketing.pages.pt-BR.faq.q2.answer: Times de produção que rodam trabalho real ao vivo. Festivais, residências, turnês, oficinas de fabricação, ativações de marca, compounds de broadcast, eventos privados. O schema é genérico; o vocabulário é específico.
marketing.pages.pt-BR.faq.q3.question: Como funciona o preço?
marketing.pages.pt-BR.faq.q3.answer: Por organização, não por assento. Grátis para sempre para times pequenos. Crew abre o time. Production libera cada módulo. Festival é multi-org com SSO, DPA personalizado e SLA de 99.9%.
marketing.pages.pt-BR.faq.q4.question: O app de campo funciona offline mesmo?
marketing.pages.pt-BR.faq.q4.answer: Sim. COMPVSS é um PWA offline-first. Scan, ponto, daily log, intake de incidente, intake médico — tudo fica em fila localmente e sincroniza quando o sinal volta. Testado em portões com 15,000 convidados.
marketing.pages.pt-BR.cta.title: ATLVS Está Aberto.
marketing.pages.pt-BR.cta.subtitle: Grátis, pra sempre, para times pequenos. Preço por organização, não por assento.

marketing.pages.solutions.atlvs.meta.des: Where the production lives. RFIs, submittals, daily logs, punch, advancing, finance, procurement, AI. Pitch through wrap. One sidebar.
marketing.pages.solutions.atlvs.schema.d: Production operations workspace. Projects, finance, procurement, advancing, AI — one workspace, one schema.
marketing.pages.solutions.atlvs.hero.sub: Pitch to wrap, in one sidebar. RFIs, submittals, daily logs, punch, advancing, finance, procurement, AI. Forty-seven modules on one schema.
Projects, tasks, Gantt, schedule, ROS, events, locations. The run-sheet.
Pipeline, leads, clients, proposals signed in place. 23 block types, e-sig in the page.
Invoices, expenses, budgets with utilization, time, mileage, advances, payouts, live P&L.
Reqs, RFQs, POs, vendor scorecards, COIs, W-9s, work order broadcasts.
Equipment, rentals with availability, fab orders, dispatch, logistics, site plans.
Directory, crew, credentials with expiry alerts, roles, call sheets, time tracking.
RFIs, submittals, daily logs, punch list, inspections (10 categories), change orders, payment apps.
Incidents, OSHA, medical, crisis comms, BC/DR, cyber-IR, safeguarding, environmental, playbooks.
Drafts riders, RFPs, recaps, call sheets from your workspace. Never the public web.
marketing.pages.solutions.atlvs.architec: List, detail, create, edit. Every module rides the same rails — with status flow where it counts (invoices, proposals, POs, tasks, RFIs). Validation at the door. Tenant walled at the database.
Same rails mean the team learns ATLVS once. New modules ship in days. The work changes — the workflow holds.
RLS at the database. Tenant walled in Postgres.
Role-aware on every action. Enforced server-side, not in the UI.
Immutable audit log. Actor, IP, before, after. Forever.
AI grounded in your workspace. Never the public internet.
Stripe Connect vendor payouts. Money never crosses our books.
Signed webhooks (HMAC-SHA256) on every state change.
Self-expiring file shares. No public buckets.
marketing.pages.solutions.atlvs.personas: Full access. Billing, org, members, integrations, branding. Runs the business while the show runs.
Finance + procurement. Invoices, expenses, budgets, POs, payouts, audit log.
Daily driver. Projects, tasks, schedule, RFIs, submittals, advancing, crew, proposals, clients.
marketing.pages.solutions.atlvs.faq.what: The production operations workspace. Red-branded, desk-bound, always on. Forty-seven modules — proposals, RFIs, submittals, daily logs, punch, inspections, advancing, finance, procurement, AI. Where the production lives.
marketing.pages.solutions.atlvs.faq.role: Ten roles (owner, admin, controller, collaborator, contractor, crew, client, viewer, and cameos). Every capability is gated by role — enforced at the database via RLS, not in the UI.
marketing.pages.solutions.atlvs.faq.bran: Self-serve brand skins under Settings → Branding land on Festival. Production gets logo + accent. Every tier respects your org's accent color in the chrome.
marketing.pages.solutions.atlvs.faq.ai.a: Anthropic Claude under the hood. A fast model for daily drafting on Production. Deep-reasoning model on Festival. Every thread logs to your workspace, scoped tight.
marketing.pages.solutions.atlvs.cta.subt: Free forever for small teams. Per-org pricing the rest of the way up.
marketing.pages.solutions.compvss.meta.d: Offline-first PWA. Sub-100ms gate scan. Shift clock-in, daily log, incident, medic, driver, guard, warehouse. Installs from the browser in one tap.
marketing.pages.solutions.compvss.schema: Offline-first PWA for production crew. Gate scan, clock-in, incident, medic, driver, guard, warehouse.
marketing.pages.solutions.compvss.hero.b: Installs from the browser in one tap. Gate scan, shift clock-in, medic triage, incident, driver run, guard tour, warehouse, daily safety brief. Works on one-bar LTE.
marketing.pages.solutions.compvss.module: What the Crew Runs in the Field.
Role-routed landing — call sheet, pinned tasks, tonight's shift.
QR + barcode. Accreditation zone logic. Sub-100ms. Offline or on.
Same KBYG as the portal — scoped crew-side to radio, PPE, SOPs.
Geo-verified clock-in / break / meal-credit / clock-out. Manual fallback included.
Pick / put-away scans. Offline queue replays in order. Nothing goes missing.
Photos, location, witnesses. Admin + medic + safeguarding lead paged instantly. Encrypted at rest.
marketing.pages.solutions.compvss.offlin: The Cell Tower Is Not Your Problem.
Gate scan, manual lookup, tonight's call sheet — cached on device. Scans queue locally and replay in order the second signal returns. Nothing drops. Nobody waits.
Install from the browser — open the link, tap Install, full-screen launcher on the home screen. Done before soundcheck.
Installs from the browser — one tap
Offline scan queue replays in order. Zero drops.
Clear scan states — accepted · duplicate · voided · not found
Camera + GPS requested only when needed
Bottom tab bar — five field-side actions
High-contrast every screen. Readable across the gate.
marketing.pages.solutions.compvss.faq.na: Is COMPVSS a native iOS / Android app?
No. PWA. Open the URL, tap Install, full-screen launcher. No App Store review. No fleet update the morning of. No version drift across your 400-person gate team.
marketing.pages.solutions.compvss.faq.no: What if the venue has no cell signal?
The scanner, tonight's call sheet, and the door pass cache on device. Scans queue locally and replay in order the moment signal returns.
marketing.pages.solutions.compvss.faq.ga: Sub-100ms server-side. US cell adds 200–400ms round-trip. Offline scans are instant locally. Duplicates, voided, not-found — distinct states, all on-screen in a glance.
marketing.pages.solutions.compvss.faq.of: Really. Scans queue on device. Replay in order when signal returns. During an offline window, duplicates the scanner can't yet confirm are flagged pending — the server reconciles on sync.
marketing.pages.solutions.compvss.faq.ca: For QR + barcode scans. Manual input is the fallback for damaged codes or blocked permissions. The crew member at the gate never waits on IT.
marketing.pages.solutions.compvss.cta.su: Installs on any phone. No App Store. No fleet update. Ready in a tap.
marketing.pages.solutions.gvteway.meta.d: Twelve personas. Each their lane. Artists see riders. Vendors see POs. Clients see proposals. Same project, RLS at the database.
marketing.pages.solutions.gvteway.jsonLd: External stakeholder portal. Twelve personas, each scoped to their lane via RLS at the database.
marketing.pages.solutions.gvteway.hero.b: Artists advance. Vendors quote. Clients sign. Guests scan in. Crew clocks on. Same project. Twelve scoped reads. RLS at the database.
marketing.pages.solutions.gvteway.person: Twelve Personas. Same Database.
Every persona arrives at its own lane — nav, flows, deliverables tuned to the role. The artist never sees the sponsor's invoice. The delegation never sees the vendor's COI. Enforced in Postgres.
Artist
Tech rider, hospitality rider, input list, stage plot, guest list, schedule, travel.
Vendor
Submissions, pull list, POs, invoices, COI + W-9 uploads, training records.
Client
Proposals signed in place, deliverables, invoices via card/ACH, messages, files.
Sponsor
Entitlements tracker, activations, brand assets, reporting, impressions.
Guest
Tickets — buy, claim, transfer. Schedule. Day-of logistics. Rideshare hand-off.
Crew
Call sheet, time submission, advances, safety briefing, SOPs.
Delegation
Entries, rate card, training venues, meetings, cases, transport, accommodation, visa.
Media
MPC rate card, accommodation, shuttles, press-conf RSVP, info-on-demand.
VIP + Hospitality
Dedicated fleet, hotel allocation, itinerary, guest list, package access.
Volunteer
Application, training, shift schedule, uniform pickup, door pass.
Athlete
Training bookings, resident services, safeguarding, visa, privacy self-service.
Privacy (all)
Every persona gets DSAR self-service + consent management. GDPR, handled.
marketing.pages.solutions.gvteway.featur: Twenty-three block types. Scroll-spy nav. Per-phase contract refs. Add-on pickers with live totals. E-sign in place — typed or drawn. Revocable share links. Version history. Engagement analytics on every scroll. Clean PDF if legal still wants paper.

One Know-Before-You-Go doc in ATLVS. Renders per-persona in the portal and in the field. Artists get riders + catering. Crew sees call sheet + radio + PPE. Guests see logistics + tickets. Seventeen section types. One source, twelve reads.
marketing.pages.solutions.gvteway.securi: Every record is scoped to its org and project in Postgres. Share links are signed, expirable, revocable, audit-logged. Nobody slips from the sponsor lounge into the artist compound — access enforced on the data, not in the UI.
Per-project portals — one link, one project
Signed share links with expiry + revocation
Every view logged in engagement analytics
E-sign in place — typed or drawn, IP + timestamp captured
marketing.pages.solutions.gvteway.faq.q1: The portal. Blue-branded. Every guest, artist, vendor, sponsor, and collaborator arrives through their own lane. Twelve personas — each sees only its scope.
marketing.pages.solutions.gvteway.faq.q2: Read-only? Share the link — they're in. Contributing (riders, COIs, signatures)? A lightweight signup creates a credential scoped to that project. Fast by design.
marketing.pages.solutions.gvteway.faq.q3: Festival. Your mark, colors, email, custom domain. Clients see your brand. Vendors see your vendors' brand.
marketing.pages.solutions.gvteway.faq.q4: How is data isolated between projects?
Postgres RLS. Every record is scoped to its org and project. The link you share maps to one project — nobody slips from one to another.
marketing.pages.solutions.gvteway.faq.q5: Can one credential access two projects?
Yes. A vendor on one project and a sponsor on another switches cleanly from the portal home. One login, two scoped reads.
marketing.pages.solutions.gvteway.cta.su: Wired default. Reskin if you want. Use it if you don't.
marketing.pages.solutions.metadata.title: Solutions — Three Apps. One Schema.
marketing.pages.solutions.metadata.descr: ATLVS — production operations workspace. GVTEWAY — stakeholder portal. COMPVSS — offline-first field PWA. Same record from the office, the stakeholder, and the gate.
marketing.pages.solutions.hero.title: Three Apps. One Schema.
marketing.pages.solutions.hero.body: ATLVS, GVTEWAY, COMPVSS. One database underneath. Same record, three optimized surfaces — your office, your stakeholders, your crew, all reading the same truth.
marketing.pages.solutions.apps.heading: The Three Apps
marketing.pages.solutions.apps.atlvs.bod: Forty-seven modules in one sidebar. Pitch through wrap. Proposals to payouts, RFIs to inspections, advancing to AI.
marketing.pages.solutions.apps.atlvs.bul: AI assistant grounded in your workspace
Immutable audit log — actor, IP, before, after
Role-aware on every action, enforced server-side
marketing.pages.solutions.apps.gvteway.b: Artist, vendor, client, sponsor, guest, crew, delegation, media, VIP, hospitality, volunteer, athlete. Same project, scoped reads.
Proposals signed in place — 23 block types
marketing.pages.solutions.apps.compvss.b: Gate scan, shift clock-in, daily log, incident, medic, driver, guard, warehouse. Installs from the browser in one tap.
Tonight's call sheet + KBYG in pocket
marketing.pages.solutions.industries.bod: Each shape gets a tuned setup — starter templates, default role matrix, vernacular notes from operators who've done it.
marketing.pages.solutions.faq.title: Solutions · FAQ
marketing.pages.solutions.faq.items.0.q: How are the three apps different?
marketing.pages.solutions.faq.items.0.a: ATLVS is the production operations workspace — where the production lives. GVTEWAY is the stakeholder portal — twelve personas, each their lane. COMPVSS is the offline-first field PWA. One database underneath.
marketing.pages.solutions.faq.items.1.a: Every tier ships all three. Most teams open with ATLVS + one GVTEWAY persona (artist or client), add COMPVSS at load-in, then expand. Your tempo.
marketing.pages.solutions.faq.items.2.q: Can other orgs see my data?
marketing.pages.solutions.faq.items.2.a: No. RLS at the database — walled in Postgres, not in the app layer. A credential in one org cannot read or touch anything in another. Enforced in the data.
marketing.pages.solutions.faq.items.3.a: Festival. Your mark, your colors, your email, your custom domain on every persona. The brand is yours.
